signals.summary: S&P 500 지수는 최근 발표된 견조한 경제 지표들이 시장에 긍정적인 영향을 미치며 상승세를 보였습니다. 예상치를 웃도는 제조업 구매관리자지수(PMI)와 소비자 신뢰 지수 발표는 미국 경제의 회복력에 대한 투자자들의 기대를 높였습니다. 이는 인플레이션에 대한 일부 우려에도 불구하고, 견고한 경제 환경이 기업 실적 개선으로 이어질 것이라는 전망에 힘을 실어주며 전반적인 시장 분위기를 고조시켰습니다.

news_articles.title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Rockets 18% on Billion-Dollar Profitability
news_articles.content:
Marvell Technology (MRVL) Rockets 18% on Billion-Dollar Profitability
Angelica Ballesteros
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 3:33 PM GMT+9
Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) is one of the
Marvell Technology soared by 18.35 percent on Friday to close at $89.57 apiece, as investors took heart from its strong earnings performance for the full fiscal year 2026, swinging to billions of profits from hundred millions of net losses a year earlier.
In an updated report, Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) said that it incurred a $2.67 billion net income in the full fiscal year ending January 31, reversing an $885 million net loss in fiscal 2025.
Photo from Marvell website
Net revenues jumped by 42 percent to $8.2 billion from $5.77 billion year-on-year.
In the fourth quarter alone, net income stood at $396.1 million, nearly double the $200.2 million in the same period a year earlier. Net revenues increased by 22 percent to $2.2 billion from $1.8 billion year-on-year.
Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) Chairman and CEO Matt Murphy attributed the company���s strong performance from the robust AI demand.
Looking ahead, the company is targeting net revenues for the first quarter of fiscal year 2027 at a midpoint of $2.4 billion, or a 27 percent jump from the $1.895 billion reported in the same period a year earlier.
GAAP diluted earnings per share are targeted at $0.31, plus or minus $0.05, versus $0.20 year-on-year.
While we acknowledge the potential of MRVL as an investment, our conviction

signals.summary: Teradyne은 AI 칩 생산 및 5G 네트워크 구축 관련 반도체 테스트 장비 수요 증가에 힘입어 최근 1년간 191% 급등하는 등 강력한 주가 상승세를 보였습니다. 2025년 4분기 실적은 시장 예상을 상회했으며, 2026년 1분기에도 AI 칩 생산 수요에 힘입어 활동 증가를 예상했습니다. 그러나 이러한 급격한 주가 상승으로 인해 시장에서는 현재 주가에 과도한 낙관론이 반영되어 고평가되었을 수 있다는 우려가 제기되고 있습니다. 일부 분석에서는 Teradyne이 저평가되지 않았다고 지적하며, AI 및 5G 관련 수요가 견고함에도 불구하고 주가 급등에 따른 밸류에이션 부담이 향후 주가 변동성에 영향을 미칠 수 있다는 분석입니다.

news_articles.title: 2 Lesser Discussed AI Stocks Worth Keeping a Close Eye On
news_articles.content:
2 Lesser Discussed AI Stocks Worth Keeping a Close Eye On
Derek Lewis
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 7:44 AM GMT+9
We���ve all become adjusted to a few of the mega-popular stocks involved in the broader AI trade, namely NVIDIA, Palantir, and Vertiv, to just name a small trio. But there are still several other companies that stand to benefit nicely from all the spending, including Photronics PLAB, and Teradyne TER.
PLAB���s Critical AI Role
Photronics, a current Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), is a global market leader in photomasks (stencils used to print tiny circuits onto semiconductor wafers) for lithographic imaging in semiconductor and flat panel display production.
PLAB shares broke out near the end of February after some consolidation, but the strength didn���t last very long. While the failed breakout is certainly not what you want to see from a sentiment standpoint, the company still plays a critical role in the AI frenzy, particularly in the chip-making supply chain.
Nonetheless, EPS revisions for its current fiscal year still remain highly positive, with a big positive revision hitting the tape near the end of Feb, as shown below.
Zacks Investment Research
PLAB���s latest release showed record-high-end (advanced chips) revenue, with noted strength in the United States. Importantly, as AI chips become more complex, PLAB���s top line is poised to benefit significantly given its critical role in the broader industry.
The company���s CapEx has also grown significantly as it looks to expan

news_articles.title: Teradyne Rides AI Test Demand And 5G Growth But Valuation Questions Rise
news_articles.content:
Teradyne Rides AI Test Demand And 5G Growth But Valuation Questions Rise
Simply Wall St
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 2:08 AM GMT+9
and cut through the noise. Over 7 million investors trust Simply Wall St to stay informed where it matters for FREE.
Teradyne (NasdaqGS:TER) reported strong Q4 2025 results, with earnings and revenue above prior expectations.
The company guided to higher activity in Q1 2026, supported by demand for semiconductor test equipment linked to AI chip production.
Teradyne and its subsidiary LitePoint agreed to work with Aethertek and Metanoia to support 5G Open RAN ecosystem deployments.
The combination of AI related chip orders and 5G collaboration highlights fresh demand drivers for Teradyne's test and measurement solutions.
Teradyne, a key supplier of semiconductor test equipment, is seeing strong interest as AI related chip production ramps and chipmakers invest in capacity. Its tools sit in the middle of that build out, checking that advanced processors meet performance and reliability requirements before they ship. At the same time, the new 5G Open RAN collaboration puts NasdaqGS:TER closer to customers building the next wave of wireless networks.
For investors, the mix of AI centric test demand and new 5G activity indicates that Teradyne is connected to several active spending cycles rather than a single product theme. Upcoming quarters will show how durable that order flow is and how efficiently the company converts it into cash and potential reinvestme

news_articles.title: Flex (FLEX) Up 5.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
news_articles.content:
Flex (FLEX) Up 5.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
Zacks Equity Research
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 1:30 AM GMT+9
A month has gone by since the last earnings report for Flex (FLEX). Shares have added about 5.6% in that time frame, outperforming the S&P 500.
Will the recent positive trend continue leading up to its next earnings release, or is Flex due for a pullback? Before we dive into how investors and analysts have reacted as of late, let's take a quick look at its latest earnings report in order to get a better handle on the important catalysts.
Flex's Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates
Flex reported third-quarter fiscal 2026 adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of 87 cents, which surpassed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 10.1%. The bottom line compared favorably with 77 cents posted in the prior-year quarter.
Revenues increased 7.7% year over year to $7.1 billion. Also, it beat the consensus mark by 3.6%. The uptick was driven by robust AI demand.
Management highlighted that the company’s strong momentum continued into the third quarter, with results surpassing guidance across all key metrics. This outperformance underscores the resilience and breadth of its diversified business model across multiple end markets, including data center. Looking ahead, the company remains confident in its ability to act as a strategic partner to its customers, helping them navigate an increasingly complex and dynamic operating environment.
Management highlighted that the company’s discipl

news_articles.content:
Is Teradyne (TER) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its 191% One Year Surge?
Simply Wall St

from the global community of over 7 million individual investors at Simply Wall St.
If you are wondering whether Teradyne's share price still reflects fair value after a strong run, you are not alone. That is exactly what this article will unpack.
The stock last closed at US$305.58, with returns of 8.0% over 30 days, 47.2% year to date, 191.0% over 1 year and 202.9% over 3 years. These figures can change how investors think about both upside and risk.
Recent coverage around Teradyne has focused on its role in the semiconductor space and how investors are reassessing companies linked to testing and automation, which ties into these sharp moves in the share price. This context matters because expectations that get baked into the price can be very different from what traditional valuation models might suggest.
On our valuation checks Teradyne currently scores
for being undervalued. Next we will walk through what standard valuation approaches say about that result, and then finish with a different way of thinking about fair value that can put those models into perspective.
Teradyne scores just 0/6 on our valuation checks. See what other red flags we found in the
.

news_articles.content:
3 Red Hot AI Stocks Sporting Favorable Zacks Ranks: SNDK, WDC, TER
Derek Lewis
Fri, March 6, 2026 at 8:11 AM GMT+9
Though it may not feel like it amid recent concerns surrounding technology, particularly in software and some other stocks tied to the broader AI frenzy, many in the trade are still crushing it in the new year, delivering big-time gains.
And concerning the all-star performers, three stocks that sport the highly-coveted Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), SanDisk SNDK, Western Digital WDC, and Teradyne TER reflect top-performing S&P 500 stocks in 2026. What���s been driving the positivity?
SanDisk Soars
SanDisk shares have been melting higher in 2026 months as its role in the broader AI frenzy finally comes into focus. The stock is up nearly 140% in the new year alone, by far reflecting one of the strongest moves we���ve seen.
AI is driving a huge surge in storage demand, which is where SanDisk comes in. NAND prices are rising rapidly, with AI data centers, cloud providers, and edge devices all needing more high-speed storage. The company���s revenue acceleration is evident in recent quarterly releases, with sales of $2.3 billion climbing 22% year-over-year throughout its latest period.
Below is an image illustrating the company���s favorable EPS outlook.

news_articles.title: Vertiv Holdings, Lumentum Holdings, Coherent, and EchoStar Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P 100, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600
news_articles.content:
This is a paid press release. Contact the press release distributor directly with any inquiries.
Vertiv Holdings, Lumentum Holdings, Coherent, and EchoStar Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P 100, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600
PR Newswire
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 8:39 AM GMT+9
,
/PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices ("S&P DJI") will make the following changes to the S&P 100, S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600 indices:
NAPCO Security Technologies Inc. (NASD: NSSC) will replace Alexander & Baldwin Inc. (NYSE: ALEX) in the S&P SmallCap 600 effective prior to the opening of trading on Friday, March 13. An investor group comprised of MW Group and funds affiliated with DivcoWest and Blackstone Real Estate is acquiring Alexander & Baldwin in a deal that is expected to close soon, pending final closing conditions.
The following changes to the S&P 100, S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600 will take effect before the market opens on Monday, March 23, as part of the quarterly rebalance. The changes ensure that each index is more representative of its market���capitalization range. The companies being removed from the S&P SmallCap 600 are no longer representative of the small���cap market space.
Following is a summary of the changes that will take place prior to the open of trading on the effective date:
ABOUT S&P DOW JONES INDICES
S&P Dow Jones Indices is the largest global resource for essential index-based concepts, data and research, and home to iconic fin

news_articles.title: MU, LRCX, AMAT, GEV All Added to the S&P 100 As AI Stocks Gain Influence
news_articles.content:
It’s the Super Bowl of index rebalancing tonight! The biggest news was the S&P 500 adding Vertiv (VRT), Lumentum (LITE), Coherent (COHR), and EchoStar (SATS). However, S&P Dow Jones Indices also rebalanced other indexes like the S&P 100 and S&P MidCap 400.
Four stocks were added to the S&P 100 on the evening of March 6, 2026, as part of the index’s quarterly rebalancing: Micron Technology (MU), Lam Research (LRCX), Applied Materials (AMAT), and GE Vernova (GEV). The move, detailed in the
, is a clear signal of how completely AI infrastructure has reshaped the landscape of America’s largest public companies.
Four AI stocks were added, and PayPal, American International Group, Metflife, and Target were removed.
What S&P 100 Inclusion Actually Means
The S&P 100 is not just a prestige list. It tracks the 100 largest U.S. companies by market cap, and inclusion triggers mandatory buying from every index fund and ETF that tracks it. The
holds $29.4 billion in assets and must now add all four stocks to its holdings. That’s automatic, price-insensitive demand. For stocks already under pressure this week, that represents automatic, price-insensitive demand from index funds.
To be clear, that $29.4 billion number is a
fraction
of the funds that follow the S&P 500. However, the S&P 100 is a major stamp of approval and an exclusive club.
It’s also worth noting that Information Technology already makes up 39.4% of OEF’s weighting, with NVIDIA alone sitting at 10.76% of the fund. These four

news_articles.title: Why Is Qualcomm (QCOM) Up 0.5% Since Last Earnings Report?
news_articles.content:
Why Is Qualcomm (QCOM) Up 0.5% Since Last Earnings Report?
Zacks Equity Research
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 1:30 AM GMT+9
A month has gone by since the last earnings report for Qualcomm (QCOM). Shares have added about 0.5% in that time frame, outperforming the S&P 500.
But investors have to be wondering, will the recent positive trend continue leading up to its next earnings release, or is Qualcomm due for a pullback? Well, first let's take a quick look at the most recent earnings report in order to get a better handle on the recent drivers for QUALCOMM Incorporated before we dive into how investors and analysts have reacted as of late.
Qualcomm Surpasses Q1 Earnings Estimates on Record Revenues
Qualcomm reported strong first-quarter fiscal 2026 results, with record revenues driven by healthy demand trends in IoT and automotive businesses. Adjusted earnings exceeded the Zacks Consensus Estimate, led by the strength of its business model, diversification initiatives and its ability to respond proactively to the evolving market scenario. However, revenues missed the consensus estimate despite increasing year over year.
Net Income
On a GAAP basis, net income in the December quarter was $3 billion or $2.78 per share compared with $3.18 billion or $2.83 per share in the prior-year quarter. Despite healthy revenue growth, the bottom line declined primarily due to higher operating costs.
Non-GAAP net income for the reported quarter came in at $3.78 billion or $3.50 per share compared wit

news_articles.title: Is It Worth Investing in Lam Research (LRCX) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
news_articles.content:
Is It Worth Investing in Lam Research (LRCX) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
Zacks Equity Research
Fri, March 6, 2026 at 11:30 PM GMT+9
When deciding whether to buy, sell, or hold a stock, investors often rely on analyst recommendations. Media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm-employed (or sell-side) analysts often influence a stock's price, but are they really important?
Before we discuss the reliability of brokerage recommendations and how to use them to your advantage, let's see what these Wall Street heavyweights think about
Lam Research
(LRCX).
Lam Research currently has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.52, on a scale of 1 to 5 (Strong Buy to Strong Sell), calculated based on the actual recommendations (Buy, Hold, Sell, etc.) made by 33 brokerage firms. An ABR of 1.52 approximates between Strong Buy and Buy.
Of the 33 recommendations that derive the current ABR, 23 are Strong Buy and three are Buy. Strong Buy and Buy respectively account for 69.7% and 9.1% of all recommendations.
Brokerage Recommendation Trends for LRCX
Broker Rating Breakdown Chart for LRCX
Check price target & stock forecast for Lam Research here>>>
The ABR suggests buying Lam Research, but making an investment decision solely on the basis of this information might not be a good idea. According to several studies, brokerage recommendations have little to no success guiding investors to choose stocks with the most potential for price appreciation.
Do you wonder why

signals.summary: 마이크론(Micron)은 인공지능(AI) 인프라를 위한 업계 최초 256GB SOCAMM2 LPDRAM 모듈 샘플 출하를 통해 기술 혁신을 선보였습니다. 이 모듈은 기존 대비 1.33배 높은 용량과 3분의 1 수준의 전력 및 공간 효율성을 제공하며, 엔비디아(Nvidia)와의 협력도 진행 중입니다. 또한, 마이크론은 S&P 100 지수에 편입되어 지수 추종 펀드들의 의무적인 매수 수요가 발생할 것으로 예상됩니다. 이처럼 강력한 긍정적 소식들이 있었음에도 불구하고, 제시된 뉴스 데이터만으로는 마이크론 주가의 하락 원인을 파악하기 어렵습니다.

news_articles.content:
This is a paid press release. Contact the press release distributor directly with any inquiries.
Vertiv Holdings, Lumentum Holdings, Coherent, and EchoStar Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P 100, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600
PR Newswire
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 8:39 AM GMT+9
,
/PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices ("S&P DJI") will make the following changes to the S&P 100, S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600 indices:
NAPCO Security Technologies Inc. (NASD: NSSC) will replace Alexander & Baldwin Inc. (NYSE: ALEX) in the S&P SmallCap 600 effective prior to the opening of trading on Friday, March 13. An investor group comprised of MW Group and funds affiliated with DivcoWest and Blackstone Real Estate is acquiring Alexander & Baldwin in a deal that is expected to close soon, pending final closing conditions.
The following changes to the S&P 100, S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600 will take effect before the market opens on Monday, March 23, as part of the quarterly rebalance. The changes ensure that each index is more representative of its market���capitalization range. The companies being removed from the S&P SmallCap 600 are no longer representative of the small���cap market space.
Following is a summary of the changes that will take place prior to the open of trading on the effective date:
ABOUT S&P DOW JONES INDICES

news_articles.title: Vertiv and EchoStar lead tech surge in S&P 500 rebalance
news_articles.content:
Vertiv and EchoStar lead tech surge in S&P 500 rebalance
Luke Juricic
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 8:06 AM GMT+9
Investing.com -- S&P Dow Jones Indices announced a sweeping overhaul of its benchmark tracking on Friday, propelling several technology and industrial firms into the prestigious S&P 500. Shares of Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE:VRT) surged 5.6% in after-hours trading following the news, while EchoStar Corporation (NASDAQ:SATS) and Lumentum Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:LITE) also saw significant gains.
The quarterly reshuffle is designed to maintain the integrity of the market���s most-watched gauges. S&P DJI stated that "The changes ensure that each index is more representative of its market���capitalization range" across the large, mid, and small-cap tiers.
Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent Inc (NYSE:COHR), and
will officially join the S&P 500 prior to the opening of trading on Monday, March 23. To make room for these additions, the index will remove Match Group Inc (NASDAQ:MTCH), Molina Healthcare Inc (NYSE:MOH), Lamb Weston Holdings Inc (NYSE:LW), and Paycom (NYSE:PAYC).
Higher up the ladder, the S&P 100 will see a notable influx of semiconductor and industrial heavyweights, including Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ:MU) and GE Vernova LLC (NYSE:GEV). These moves come at the expense of veteran financial firms like PayPal Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:PYPL) and American International Group Inc (NYSE:AIG), which are exiting the blue-chip 100-member club.
Investors expect these adjustments to trigger bil

news_articles.content:
It’s the Super Bowl of index rebalancing tonight! The biggest news was the S&P 500 adding Vertiv (VRT), Lumentum (LITE), Coherent (COHR), and EchoStar (SATS). However, S&P Dow Jones Indices also rebalanced other indexes like the S&P 100 and S&P MidCap 400.
Four stocks were added to the S&P 100 on the evening of March 6, 2026, as part of the index’s quarterly rebalancing: Micron Technology (MU), Lam Research (LRCX), Applied Materials (AMAT), and GE Vernova (GEV). The move, detailed in the
, is a clear signal of how completely AI infrastructure has reshaped the landscape of America’s largest public companies.
Four AI stocks were added, and PayPal, American International Group, Metflife, and Target were removed.
What S&P 100 Inclusion Actually Means
The S&P 100 is not just a prestige list. It tracks the 100 largest U.S. companies by market cap, and inclusion triggers mandatory buying from every index fund and ETF that tracks it. The
holds $29.4 billion in assets and must now add all four stocks to its holdings. That’s automatic, price-insensitive demand. For stocks already under pressure this week, that represents automatic, price-insensitive demand from index funds.
To be clear, that $29.4 billion number is a
fraction
of the funds that follow the S&P 500. However, the S&P 100 is a major stamp of approval and an exclusive club.

news_articles.title: Micron (MU) Ships Industry-First 256GB SOCAMM2 Samples for AI Infrastructure
news_articles.content:
Micron (MU) Ships Industry-First 256GB SOCAMM2 Samples for AI Infrastructure
Maham Fatima
Sat, March 7, 2026 at 4:43 AM GMT+9
Micron Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:
) is one of the
. On March 3, Micron Technology set a new industry benchmark by shipping customer samples of the 256GB SOCAMM2, the world���s highest-capacity LPDRAM module. Powered by the industry���s first monolithic 32Gb LPDDR5X die, this modular solution is designed to overcome the power and thermal constraints of modern AI infrastructure.
By delivering 1.33x more capacity than previous versions, the SOCAMM2 allows for up to 2TB of LPDRAM per 8-channel server CPU, providing the massive memory footprint required for long-context LLM inference and HPC. The SOCAMM2 offers a transformational shift in data center efficiency, consuming only one-third of the power and occupying one-third of the footprint compared to standard RDIMMs. This drastic reduction in energy use and size enables significantly higher rack density and a lower total cost of ownership for operators.
Performance-wise, the module delivers a 2.3x faster time to first token for real-time LLM inference and 3x better performance-per-watt in standalone CPU applications, addressing the primary bottlenecks in AI reasoning and data-intensive core compute. To accelerate industry adoption, Micron Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) is collaborating with Nvidia to co-design memory solutions tailored for next-gen AI CPUs. The SOCAMM2���s modular design not only improves servi

signals.summary: ON 세미컨덕터는 전기차 및 스마트폰 시장 수요 둔화에 대응하여 실리콘 카바이드(SiC) 및 AI 데이터센터 전력 솔루션과 같은 고마진 부문에 자원과 자본을 집중하는 전략적 재편을 진행 중입니다. 이는 투자 수익률을 높이고 현금 흐름을 강화하기 위한 조치로 해석됩니다. 최근 주가는 단기적으로 하락세를 보였으나, 3개월 및 1년 기준으로 보면 견고한 상승 모멘텀을 유지하고 있으며, 애널리스트들의 긍정적 평가와 목표주가 상향 조정(DB의 목표가 $65→$75 상향)이 이어지고 있습니다. 특히 4분기 실적에서 견조한 마진율과 기록적인 잉여현금흐름(FCF)을 달성하며 긍정적인 펀더멘털을 입증했습니다. 투자자들의 관심이 집중되고 있으나, 현재 주가는 분석가들의 목표가에 근접하여 향후 성장이 이미 주가에 반영되었는지에 대한 평가가 필요한 시점입니다.

news_articles.title: ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
news_articles.content:
ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
Zacks Equity Research
Wed, March 4, 2026 at 11:00 PM GMT+9
ON Semiconductor Corp.
(ON) has recently been on Zacks.com's list of the most searched stocks. Therefore, you might want to consider some of the key factors that could influence the stock's performance in the near future.
Shares of this semiconductor components maker have returned +6.7% over the past month versus the Zacks S&P 500 composite's -1.3% change. The Zacks Semiconductor - Analog and Mixed industry, to which ON Semiconductor Corp. belongs, has gained 2.8% over this period. Now the key question is: Where could the stock be headed in the near term?
Although media reports or rumors about a significant change in a company's business prospects usually cause its stock to trend and lead to an immediate price change, there are always certain fundamental factors that ultimately drive the buy-and-hold decision.
Earnings Estimate Revisions
Rather than focusing on anything else, we at Zacks prioritize evaluating the change in a company's earnings projection. This is because we believe the fair value for its stock is determined by the present value of its future stream of earnings.
Our analysis is essentially based on how sell-side analysts covering the stock are revising their earnings estimates to take the latest business trends into account. When earnings estimates for a company go up, the fair value for its stock goes up a

ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:

Deutsche Bank Highlights Positive Momentum in ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON) Q4 Performance
ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) is one of the
most promising stocks.
TheFly reported on February 13 that Deutsche Bank raised its price target on ON to $75 from $65 and maintained a Buy rating. The firm noted that the company���s Q4 results are improving, albeit gradually.
On February 9, ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) released its full-year results and recorded $1.53 billion in revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company's gross margins for the fourth quarter were 36.0% and 38.2%, with GAAP and non-GAAP operating margins of 13.1% and 19.8%, respectively. GAAP diluted earnings per share were $0.45, while non-GAAP diluted earnings per share were $0.64. Over the course of the year, ON generated $1.8 billion in cash from operations and $1.4 billion in free cash flow, resulting in a record-high free cash flow margin of 24%.
In order to spur growth in automotive, industrial, and AI data center applications, the business emphasized investments in intelligent power and sensor technologies while highlighting operational discipline and stabilization in important markets. Through share repurchases, ON gave back all of its yearly free cash flow to shareholders. It also keeps fortifying it

news_articles.title: ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON): A Bull Case Theory
news_articles.content:
ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON): A Bull Case Theory
Ricardo Pillai
Sun, March 1, 2026 at 3:29 AM GMT+9
We came across a
on ON Semiconductor Corporation on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls��� thesis on ON. ON Semiconductor Corporation's share was trading at $69.68 as of February 25th. ON���s trailing and forward P/E were 46.42 and 17.01, respectively according to Yahoo Finance.
Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) Draws Mixed Analyst Views as AI ASIC Momentum Faces Hyperscaler Risks
Photo by JESHOOTS.COM on Unsplash
ON Semiconductor Corporation provides intelligent sensing and power solutions in Hong Kong, Singapore, the United Kingdom, the United States, and internationally. ON is positioned as a differentiated semiconductor leader through its focus on gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) technologies rather than traditional silicon-based chips.
These advanced materials enable higher voltage tolerance, greater thermal performance, and superior power density, making ON���s solutions critical for intelligent power management, sensing, and high-efficiency systems across electric vehicles, industrial automation, and energy infrastructure. SiC, in particular, is becoming foundational in advanced image sensors, robotics, medical imaging, smart grids, and next-generation power systems, while adoption in data centers and networking continues accelerating, with AI-driven demand adding further momentum.
Despite cyclical softness in 2025 among automakers, r

news_articles.title: ON Semiconductor Refocuses On Higher Margin Growth And Cash Generation
news_articles.content:
ON Semiconductor Refocuses On Higher Margin Growth And Cash Generation
Simply Wall St
Sun, March 1, 2026 at 1:09 AM GMT+9
in any market cycle. Join 7 million investors using Simply Wall St's investing ideas for FREE.
ON Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:ON) is shifting capital and resources toward higher margin segments such as silicon carbide and AI data center power solutions.
The company is tightening capital discipline and prioritizing projects that target stronger returns on investment.
This repositioning comes as demand cools in core markets including electric vehicles and smartphones.
ON Semiconductor, a key supplier of power and sensing chips, is recalibrating its business mix as parts of the automotive and consumer electronics markets face softer demand. Management is leaning into areas like silicon carbide, which is used in power electronics, and solutions for AI data centers where power efficiency is a core requirement. At the same time, the company is putting more scrutiny on how and where it deploys capital.
For you as an investor, an important consideration is how this shift toward higher margin projects and tighter spending could influence the company���s earnings quality and free cash flow over time. The coming quarters will help clarify how quickly the new focus areas scale and how effectively ON Semiconductor manages ongoing sector headwinds.

ON Semiconductor (ON) has drawn fresh interest after investors digested its recent share performance, with the stock showing mixed short term moves but stronger gains over the past 3 months and year.
ON Semiconductor's share price has cooled in the very short term, with a 1 day share price return of a 2.42% decline and a 7 day share price return of a 3.77% decline. However, the 90 day share price return of 32.38% and 1 year total shareholder return of 41.36% show that momentum has been building over a longer period, even as the 3 year total shareholder return of a 15.75% decline contrasts with the 5 year total shareholder return of 71.37%.
If ON's recent rebound has you thinking about where else growth and risk could be shifting, it might be worth scanning
as another way to source ideas.
With ON trading near its analyst price target, recent revenue and net income growth on the table, and only a modest intrinsic discount indicated, you have to ask: Is there still a buying opportunity here, or is future growth already priced in?

news_articles.title: Semiconductor Opportunity Is Here
news_articles.content:
Semiconductor Opportunity Is Here
Lucas Downey
Fri, March 6, 2026 at 8:17 PM GMT+9
Of course, that means the AI trade. You may have heard that it���s dead. I���m here to tell you it���s not.
A Lot More Room to Run
Last year, pretty much anything associated with AI (or maybe even mentioning the technology) went up in value. This year that���s not the case.
Some technology stocks have suffered this year. But not all AI-related firms are lumped in with that group.
In fact, I think many companies directly in the AI mix have a lot more room to run. It���s clear when you examine the fundamentals. Plus, many large semiconductor firms are trading below analyst price targets.
That all means semiconductor opportunity is here.
Applied Materials
Applied Materials, Inc. (
) is a nearly $300 billion market cap chip manufacturer. Its shares have been on a huge run, gaining 39% so far this year.
The company���s first-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings report was solid, with $7 billion in revenue and non-GAAP per-share earnings of $2.38. More importantly, the company���s quarterly revenue guidance called for $7.65 billion (9.1% above consensus), with EPS guidance of up to $2.84 (15.8% above expectations).
The fundamental picture is strong:
1-year EPS estimate (+26.3%)
3-year EPS growth rate (+5.2%)
Profit margin (+24.7%)

news_articles.title: Better Nuclear Energy Stock: NuScale Power (SMR) vs. Oklo (OKLO)
Oklo Meta Deal Links Early Nuclear Funding To Future Data Center Demand
news_articles.content:
Oklo Meta Deal Links Early Nuclear Funding To Future Data Center Demand
Simply Wall St
Thu, March 5, 2026 at 8:17 AM GMT+9
with Simply Wall St's easy, visual tools that give you a competitive edge.
Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) has signed a prepayment power agreement with Meta Platforms for electricity from its planned Ohio nuclear plant.
The arrangement is intended to fund the initial stages of the project, including pre construction and site characterization work targeted for 2026.
The deal links Oklo's planned small modular reactor output to future energy needs for Meta's operations, including data centers.
Oklo is developing small modular nuclear reactors aimed at providing reliable, carbon free power, and this agreement with Meta puts a tech company directly in the customer seat. For investors, it ties a young nuclear developer to the growing electricity demand from data centers and AI infrastructure. It also gives NYSE:OKLO a defined commercial pathway for part of its planned Ohio capacity.
Looking ahead, the prepayment structure may help Oklo address early project costs and reduce some funding uncertainty around site work in 2026. For you as an investor, the key questions now center on how Oklo executes on permits, construction readiness, and future offtake agreements as the Ohio project progresses.

signals.summary: KLA 주가는 이란 관련 지정학적 긴장 고조로 촉발된 반도체 섹터 전반의 매도세에 휩쓸리며 하락세를 기록했다. 이러한 하락세는 투자 심리 위축에 기인한 것으로 보이며, 시장은 3월 12일 예정된 투자자의 날 행사에 주목하고 있다. 이 행사에서는 회사의 장기 목표와 제품 계획이 공개될 예정이어서 단기적인 주요 변곡점이 될 전망이다. 다만, 지정학적 요인에 따른 변동성에도 불구하고, 칩 복잡성 증가에 따른 공정 제어(Process Control)의 중요성은 여전히 유효하며, 이는 KLA의 핵심 투자 논리로 남아있다.

news_articles.title: 3 High-Flying Stocks Worth Investigating
news_articles.content:
3 High-Flying Stocks Worth Investigating
3 High-Flying Stocks Worth Investigating
Adam Hejl
Fri, March 6, 2026 at 9:59 PM GMT+9
"You get what you pay for" often applies to expensive stocks with best-in-class business models and execution. While their quality can sometimes justify the premium, they typically experience elevated volatility during market downturns when expectations change.
Finding the right balance between price and quality can challenge even the most skilled investors. Luckily for you, we started StockStory to help you identify the real opportunities. That said, here are three high-flying stocks expanding their competitive advantages.
KLA Corporation (KLAC)
Forward P/E Ratio: 35.8x
Formed by the 1997 merger of the two leading semiconductor yield management companies, KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is the leading supplier of equipment used to measure and inspect semiconductor chips.
Why Will KLAC Outperform?
Annual revenue growth of 16% over the last five years was superb and indicates its market share increased during this cycle
Offerings are mission-critical for businesses and result in a best-in-class gross margin of 60.7%
Impressive free cash flow profitability enables the company to fund new investments or reward investors with share buybacks/dividends, and its improved cash conversion implies it���s becoming a less capital-intensive business
At $1,435 per share, KLA Corporation trades at 35.8x forward P/E. Is now the time to initiate a position?
.

Where is KLA Corporation (KLAC) Headed According to the Street?
KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) received several rating updates in February. On February 26, Citi opened an ���upside 30-day catalyst watch��� on KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) and maintained a Buy rating on the shares, setting a price target of $1,800. The firm believes that the company will issue 2030 targets that can reach $24 billion in revenue and $68 in earnings per share.
On February 24, Morgan Stanley lifted the price target on KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) to $1,809 from $1,751 while maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm told investors in a research note that it raised its 2026 and 2027 wafer fab equipment market growth forecasts to 23% and 27% from 13% and 19%, respectively, driven by DRAM memory spending.
KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) also received a rating update from Jefferies on February 12. The firm lifted the price target on the stock to $520 from $390 on February 12, maintaining a Buy rating on the shares and telling investors that the company���s low-double digit WFE growth outlook is more in line with KLA Corp���s view than the higher Lam Research forecast. Jefferies also believes that the outlook offered by Nova is "on the conservative end and there is room for upside".

In recent days, KLA Corporation has been caught up in a broad semiconductor sector sell-off linked to geopolitical tensions in Iran that pressured chipmakers globally.
At the same time, KLA remains a focus for investors ahead of its March 12 Investor Day, where updated long-term goals and product plans are expected to be outlined.
Against this backdrop of geopolitically driven sector volatility, we���ll examine how renewed attention on KLA���s process-control franchise could influence its investment narrative.

KLA Investment Narrative Recap

The recent geopolitically driven sell���off looks more sentiment���driven than thesis���breaking, while the near term spotlight stays firmly on the March 12 Investor Day as the key catalyst, with the main risk still centered on policy and demand shocks in core markets like China.

news_articles.title: Here's Why KLA (KLAC) Fell More Than Broader Market
news_articles.content:
Here's Why KLA (KLAC) Fell More Than Broader Market
Zacks Equity Research
Fri, March 6, 2026 at 8:00 AM GMT+9
In the latest trading session, KLA (KLAC) closed at $1,426.14, marking a -3.37% move from the previous day. This change lagged the S&P 500's 0.57% loss on the day. At the same time, the Dow lost 1.61%, and the tech-heavy Nasdaq lost 0.26%.
The stock of maker of equipment for manufacturing semiconductors has risen by 12.9% in the past month, leading the Computer and Technology sector's loss of 0.64% and the S&P 500's loss of 0.15%.
Market participants will be closely following the financial results of KLA in its upcoming release. The company is predicted to post an EPS of $9.12, indicating a 8.44% growth compared to the equivalent quarter last year. Simultaneously, our latest consensus estimate expects the revenue to be $3.37 billion, showing a 9.9% escalation compared to the year-ago quarter.
For the annual period, the Zacks Consensus Estimates anticipate earnings of $36.58 per share and a revenue of $13.39 billion, signifying shifts of +9.92% and +10.12%, respectively, from the last year.
It is also important to note the recent changes to analyst estimates for KLA. These recent revisions tend to reflect the evolving nature of short-term business trends. Therefore, positive revisions in estimates convey analysts' confidence in the business performance and profit potential.
